meta.title: OT Specific DPI for Operational Awareness: Ultra 3eti Session
meta.description:
Matt Cowell presented for Ultra 3eti on the S4x17 Sponsor Stage. This is a good primer on ICS deep packet inspection (DPI). What it is. How it can help you with the identify, detect and respond portions of your ICS security program.

4:04 - Describes 3 categories of ICS anomalies (system, network, device)
15:00 - DPI benefits in OT
22:00 3eti's view of ICS DPI
28:55 Cyberfence product presentation
